title: Sonic Checkpoints - S1 Lamp Posts
description: Respawn Anchors now look more like Sonic 1's Lamp Posts!
body:
Downgrades the respawn anchors to simple pedestals, where Sonic 1's Lamp Posts sit on.
Recommended with RedPierre's [Genesis Flowers](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/genesis-flowers/).

_Looking for the Star Posts from Sonic 2? [Click here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sonic-checkpoints-s2-star-posts)._
